name: Trevor Wallace
bio: Trevor Wallace is an American comedian, writer, and content creator from Camarillo, California, known for viral sketches, social-media characters, and crowd-work-driven stand-up. He released his first hour-long special, Pterodactyl, on Prime Video in 2023.

timeline.ev: Builds a following through viral comedy videos online
Releases first stand-up special, Pterodactyl, on Prime Video
